name: SCENARIO #3.1.1: Verify that if user specifies different addresses in "from" and "to" fields - "Optimal" route can be selected in the route selection section and text and duration values are recalculated.

statusDetails.message: XPASS Legacy bug: duration value is not recalculated when switching between "Fast" and "Optimal" tabs.

steps.name: Fill in the "From" and "Where" field: from "'Хамовнический вал, 34'" to "'Зубовский бульвар, 37'".
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]') with value: 'Хамовнический вал, 34'.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]') with value: 'Зубовский бульвар, 37'.
Click on the "Fast" tab in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Check if the "Fast" tab is active.
Get the field attribute.
Check the price value in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="text"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="text"]').
Check the duration value in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="duration"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="duration"]').
Click on the "Optimal" tab in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Оптимальный"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Оптимальный"]').
Check if the "Optimal" tab is active.
Get the field attribute.
Check the price value in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="text"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="text"]').
Check the duration value in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="duration"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="duration"]').

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='Legacy bug: duration value is not recalculated when switching between "Fast" and "Optimal" tabs.')
